allow: PowerShell(Write-Output "=== User PATH \(persistent\) ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "User"\) -split ';'; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== Machine PATH \(persistent\) ==="; [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path", "Machine"\) -split ';' | Where-Object { $_ -match 'git|github|cli' }; Write-Output ""; Write-Output "=== git.exe search ==="; @\("C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "C:\\Program Files \(x86\)\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\bin\\git.exe", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Programs\\Git\\mingw64\\bin\\git.exe"\) | ForEach-Object { "$_  -> $\(Test-Path $_\)" })
